title: Gatekeeper Review Verdict
description: Strict v1 artifact emitted by one read-only review lane and validated against its brief token and round.

apiVersion.description: Version of the Gatekeeper review-verdict contract.

verdict.description: Lane judgment. A fail verdict requires blockers; a pass verdict forbids them.

run_token.description: Non-empty one-time token copied verbatim from this lane's generated brief.

round.description: Positive integer review round for which this artifact was produced.

blockers.description: Evidence-backed defects that make the lane fail. Empty exactly when verdict is pass.

non_blockers.description: Advisory observations recorded without changing the lane verdict.

out_of_scope.description: Optional array of non-empty notes about observations deliberately excluded from this lane's review scope.

blockerReference.description: Stable blocker id or prior-round reference in B-r{round}-L{lane}-{seq} form: positive non-zero-prefixed round/lane and sequence 01 through 99.

blocker.description: One concrete, evidence-backed defect found by the review lane.

id.description: Optional stable identity minted for this blocker.

ref.description: Optional intended reference to a blocker from an earlier review round; this schema validates syntax only.

file.description: Non-empty file location supporting the blocker.

line.description: Optional positive one-based line number in file.

evidence.description: Concrete non-empty evidence explaining why this is a blocker.

suggested_fix.description: Optional non-empty remediation guidance for the authoring agent.

category.description: Optional stable defect family used for reporting and prioritization.

nonBlocker.description: One advisory observation that does not fail the lane.

file.description: Optional non-empty file location for the observation.

line.description: Optional positive one-based line number in file.
